special_mechanics.name: Jade Companions
special_mechanics.description: Player can have up to two jades (creatures) following the character that perform tasks such as healing or long-range attacks

special_mechanics.name: Weapon Variety
special_mechanics.description: Multiple weapon types including bows, boomerangs, swords, axes, and flails with varying attack properties

tier_notes: Tier 3: No quantified movement physics or sub-pixel system data available in public sources. Game is primarily documented through reviews and gameplay descriptions rather than technical specifications. Movement mechanics not isolated or detailed in any accessible documentation.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Brain Lord article (gameplay, mechanics overview)
